---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused enhancement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or operator problem does this solve?

## Proposal

Describe the smallest useful implementation.

## Non-Goals

What should this not attempt to solve?

## Safety / Persistence Impact

Does this touch Learn Mode, WAL, pruning, model files, or shell execution?

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler options.
